overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking through a rainy night in a frontier port town. The character moves from wooden docks along the waterfront, transitions through a town street with train tracks where a horse-drawn carriage passes, and approaches an industrial factory with smoking chimneys.

events.description: character exits covered walkway onto open wooden dock
heavy rain begins falling as character reaches open dock area

agents.ego_description: walking out from between green wooden buildings onto an open dock area facing the water

overhead wooden roof structure of the covered passage
wet wooden planks of the dock walkway
lit gas lamp on wooden post illuminating the dock
dark water of the harbor beyond the dock

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow covered walkway between green wooden buildings. The character walks forward and exits onto an open wooden dock where heavy rain begins to fall. Street lamps cast warm light on the wet planks as the harbor water becomes visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden shipping dock with cargo and storage

character begins ascending wooden stairs leading up from the dock

agents.ego_description: walking along the dock, turning back toward the buildings, and ascending wooden stairs to upper level

entered.detail: stacked wooden shipping crates on the dock
steep wooden staircase leading up from dock level
small boat tied to the dock in the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the rainy dock, passing wooden crates and barrels, then turns back toward land. The character approaches and begins ascending a steep wooden staircase leading up from the waterfront, with the green wooden building wall now on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: town street with train tracks and wooden buildings

events.description: character exits covered dock structure onto open street with train tracks
horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered dock area onto a muddy street and walking alongside train tracks

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the street from left to right

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dock structure onto an open muddy street with train tracks running through it. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left. The character walks along the tracks with wooden town buildings on the left and a large industrial building becoming visible in the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront with cotton shipping factory

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tall factory smokestacks
camera returns to level as character continues walking past the factory

agents.ego_description: walking toward the industrial factory, pausing to look up at the smoking chimneys, then continuing along the path

entered.detail: large brick industrial building with 'COTTON SHIPPING HOUSE' painted signage
three tall industrial chimneys emitting dark smoke
dark smoke billowing from the factory stacks against the night sky
rows of lit windows on the industrial building facade
scattered trees and vegetation along the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large industrial brick building labeled 'COTTON SHIPPING HOUSE' with three tall smokestacks billowing dark smoke. The camera tilts up to emphasize the towering chimneys against the stormy night sky before returning to level as the character walks past the factory along a dirt path lined with sparse trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered waterfront walkway into a rainy, industrial frontier town. It begins within a narrow covered passage between green wooden buildings before exiting onto an open dock where heavy rain falls and street lamps illuminate wet planks beside the harbor. As the character passes crates and barrels, the camera follows a turn back toward land and ascends a steep wooden staircase that leads away from the waterfront. The scene then opens onto a muddy street with train tracks where a horse-drawn carriage passes by, shifting the view from the town's wooden storefronts toward a looming industrial structure in the distance. Finally, the camera approaches the brick Cotton Shipping House, tilting upward to capture three towering smokestacks billowing dark smoke into the stormy night sky before leveling out as the character walks along a sparse, tree-lined dirt path.
